parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, send: false, reason: "autoreply_disabled", message: "autoreply is disabled" } }];

const text = String($json.send_message ?? '').trim();
const handoffKeywords = [
  '退款',
  '售后',
  '投诉',
  '举报',
  '假货',
  '法律',
  '起诉',
  '律师',
  '辱骂',
  '威胁',
  '线下交易',
  '线下',
  '微信',
  'QQ',
  'qq',
  '支付宝',
  '银行卡',
  '转账',
  '私聊',
  '加我',
  '地址纠纷',
  '订单异常',
  '付款异常',
  '支付异常',
  '发货纠纷',
  '绕开平台',
  '平台外交易',
  '承诺',
  '保证',
  '赔偿',
];

const hit = handoffKeywords.find((keyword) => text.includes(keyword));
const handoff = Boolean(hit);
const handoffReason = hit ? `hit_handoff_keyword:${hit}` : '';
const routeReason = handoff ? 'handoff_gate_keyword' : 'default_openclaw';
const risk = handoff ? 'high' : 'normal';
const riskReason = handoff ? handoffReason : 'default_openclaw';

return [{
  json: {
    ...$json,
    handoff,
    handoff_reason: handoffReason,
    route_reason: routeReason,
    risk,
    risk_reason: riskReason,
    should_send: !handoff,
  },
}];

const toBool = (value) => [true, 'true', 1, '1'].includes(value);
return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    send: false,
    handoff: true,
    handoff_reason: String($json.handoff_reason || 'handoff_gate_keyword'),
    route_reason: String($json.route_reason || 'handoff_gate_keyword'),
    reason: 'handoff_gate',
    dry_run: toBool($json.dry_run),
    cid: $json.cid ?? '',
    send_user_id: $json.send_user_id ?? '',
    send_message: $json.send_message ?? '',
    risk: $json.risk ?? 'high',
    risk_reason: $json.risk_reason ?? String($json.handoff_reason || 'handoff_gate_keyword'),
    item_context_status: 'skipped_handoff',
    item_context_reason: 'handoff_before_openclaw',
    openclaw_response: null,
    should_send: false,
    final_reply: '',
  },
}];

parameters.jsCode:
const toTrue = (value) => [true, 'true', 1, '1'].includes(value);

return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    send: false,
    dry_run: true,
    reason: 'dry_run',
    cid: $json.cid ?? '',
    send_user_id: $json.send_user_id ?? '',
    send_message: $json.send_message ?? '',
    risk: $json.risk ?? '',
    risk_reason: $json.risk_reason ?? '',
    handoff: toTrue($json.handoff),
    handoff_reason: String($json.handoff_reason || ''),
    route_reason: String($json.route_reason || ''),
    item_context_status: String($json.item_context_status || ''),
    item_context_reason: String($json.item_context_reason || ''),
    openclaw_response: $json.openclaw_response ?? null,
    should_send: toTrue($json.should_send),
    reply: String($json.reply || ''),
    sanitized_reply: String($json.sanitized_reply || ''),
    final_reply: String($json.final_reply || ''),
    openclaw_reply_source: String($json.openclaw_reply_source || ''),
    openclaw_reason: String($json.openclaw_reason || ''),
    openclaw_error: String($json.openclaw_error || ''),
  },
}];

return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    send: false,
    reason: String($json.reason || $json.route_reason || 'blocked'),
    cid: $json.cid ?? '',
    send_user_id: $json.send_user_id ?? '',
    send_message: $json.send_message ?? '',
    handoff: [true, 'true', 1, '1'].includes($json.handoff),
    handoff_reason: $json.handoff_reason || '',
    route_reason: $json.route_reason || '',
    item_context_status: $json.item_context_status || '',
    item_context_reason: $json.item_context_reason || '',
    openclaw_response: $json.openclaw_response ?? null,
    should_send: [true, 'true', 1, '1'].includes($json.should_send),
    final_reply: $json.final_reply || '',
  },
}];
